message:
perf(core,vdbe): autoincrement sequence fast-path, post-write action pipeline, VDBE engine profiling expansion

Optimizes autoincrement sequence management and expands the profiling
surface for the VDBE engine.

Autoincrement sequence fast-path (connection.rs):

- New PreparedInsertPostWriteAction enum with RefreshSqliteSequenceCache
  variant. After an INSERT into an autoincrement table, the sequence
  cache is updated via a fast path that avoids a full sqlite_sequence
  table scan when the new rowid is known to be the maximum.

- New hot-path counters: autoincrement_sequence_fast_path_updates
  (fast path taken) and autoincrement_sequence_scan_refreshes (full
  scan fallback). Integrated into HotPathProfileSnapshot with proper
  reset and snapshot support.

VDBE engine profiling (engine.rs):

- Additional VDBE metric counters for write-path instrumentation.

E2E infrastructure (realdb_e2e.rs + perf_runner.rs):

- Profile report structures updated to include the new autoincrement
  sequence counters.

Also updates beads issue tracker metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
